definition card, Factor (English) / Faktè (Haitian Creole): the numbers that are multiplied together in a multiplication equation. In 4 × 6 = 24, the factors are 4 and 6. The factors tell us how many groups and how many objects are in each group. / nimewo yo k ap miltipliye ansanm nan yon ekwasyon miltiplikasyon. Nan 4 × 6 = 24, faktè yo se 4 ak 6. Faktè yo di nou konbyen gwoup ak konbyen objè ki nan chak gwoup.
